middleware.description: Thin wrapper over entitlement.enforce that specifically checks the `referrals_capture` entitlement. On refusal, returns 402 `REFERRAL_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED` with an upgrade CTA in the response envelope's .errors[0].meta.upgrade_url.

For referral claim routes. Reads {code} path parameter; resolves via ReferralCodeRepository → ReferralProgram; refuses when program.status != 'active' OR program.program_starts_at > now() OR program_ends_at < now(). On success, stores program on RequestContext::referralProgram() so downstream services can call Request::activeReferralProgram() without re-fetching.

Reads the signed referral cookie (set by the /claim endpoint) and loads the Referral row into RequestContext::inboundReferral(). Applied to the signup + trigger paths so downstream services can correlate the current user's action with a previously-claimed referral. Optional (skipped when the request carries no cookie — most routes).

consumed.note: The permission-based authorize middleware wraps the ability checks defined in policies.json + permissions.json.
growth::attribution's request-boundary middleware. Must run BEFORE referrals.enforce_active_program so the attribution snapshot is available when the referral row is created.
compliance::consent's consent gate. Marketing-consent required for invitation composer + click capture.
